title: Add dark mode toggle to dashboard
description: Implement a dark/light mode toggle in the dashboard. Use the existing theme context in `src/dashboard/context/ThemeContext.tsx`. Add a toggle button to the header and persist user preference in localStorage.

title: Fix login redirect loop
description: After successful login, users are redirected to `/dashboard` but immediately loop back to `/login`. Debug the auth flow in `src/server/auth.ts` and fix the redirect logic.

title: Add API rate limiting
description: Implement rate limiting for the `/api/work-items` endpoint. Use the `express-rate-limit` package and configure a limit of 100 requests per minute per IP.
